notes: v0.16.3 — HOME / SHOP / PLAY polish. GRINDARE STUDIO chip is bigger with a fitted caption (no overflow), DAILY MISSION card has a star icon + gold REWARD chip + larger progress bar, SEASON panel now reads COMING SOON instead of the fake TIER 7 placeholder. SHOP key bundles render stacked key icons (1 / 3 / 4 / 5 keys fanned with a bright '× N' multiplier chip) instead of a plain text label. PLAY hub gains a second row of 4 PLANNED placeholder cards: KAMPANIA, RANKINGI, STREAMER MODE, FUN ROOM — each routes to its own coming-soon page. Windows only.
